chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 1651 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi. 04.11.2016. Mr. Aijaz Ahmed Chandio, Advocate for petitioners alongwith petitioners. Mr. Ali Abbas Memon, State Counsel alongwith SIP Manzoor Ali SHO P.S B-Section Tando Adam and SIP Nisar Mughal, P.S Shahdadpur. -.-.-. Both petitioners are present in person alongwith their Counsel, who reconfirm the averments of their petition that they have contracted freewill marriage but their anxiety is that private respondents No.4 to 6, who are relatives and not even the immediate family members, are causing harassment to the petitioners and family members of petitioner No.2 and extending them threats. Today learned State Counsel has filed parawise comments of official respondents/police officials in which police officials while denying the allegation of harassment have also undertaken to provide protection to the petitioners within the parameters of law. This petition is disposed of in view of above observation and with direction with directions to the respondents not to cause any harassment to the petitioners with further directions to the official respondents to conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and to provide protection to the petitioners if they are approached with such a request. Copy of this shall be served by the concerned SHO on the private respondents No.4 to 6 Aamir, Muhammad Wakeel Anjum and Muhammad Nadeem and compliance report of that service on these private respondents by the concerned SHO SIP Manzoor Ali of P.S B-Section Tando Adam shall be submitted in this Court with the Additional Registrar.

This petition is disposed of in view of above observation and with direction with directions to the respondents not to cause any harassment to the petitioners with further directions to the official respondents to conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and to provide protection to the petitioners if they are approached with such a request. Copy of this shall be served by the concerned SHO on the private respondents No.4 to 6 Aamir, Muhammad Wakeel Anjum and Muhammad Nadeem and compliance report of that service on these private respondents by the concerned SHO SIP Manzoor Ali of P.S B-Section Tando Adam shall be submitted in this Court with the Additional Registrar. Copy of this order be provided to learned State Counsel for compliance of above order. JUDGE Ali Haider
